summary:
🤖 AI Daily Brief
- **Codex**: v0.113.0 shipped (2026-03-10) with a built-in `request_permissions` tool + new TUI approval flow; **why it matters**: smoother in-session privilege escalation without restarting runs.
- **Claude Code**: v2.1.72 shipped (2026-03-09/10) fixing tool search with `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` + adding `/copy` → `w` to write selection directly to file; **why it matters**: fewer broken tool-discovery setups and faster remote/SSH workflows.
- **Cursor / Windsurf / other majors**: no new releases logged on AIShipped in the last 24 hours; **why it matters**: today’s meaningful movement was concentrated in Codex + Claude Code.

🤖 AI Daily Brief
- **Codex**: Shipped **v0.114.0** (within last 24h) with experimental **code mode** + **hooks engine**, better handoff context, and multiple permission/approval fixes; **why it matters**: safer isolated workflows, better automation extensibility, and fewer broken runs.
- **Claude Code**: No new release detected in the last 24h on AI Shipped; **why it matters**: no workflow changes you need to adapt to today.
- **Cursor**: No new release detected in the last 24h; **why it matters**: stable behavior, no immediate migration/update action needed.
- **Windsurf**: No new release detected in the last 24h; **why it matters**: current setup should continue unchanged.
- **Other major AI dev tools tracked (Amp/OpenCode/Factory/OpenClaw)**: No new releases detected in the last 24h; **why it matters**: ecosystem shipping was quiet outside Codex today.

🤖 AI Daily Brief
- **Claude Code** — v2.1.73 and v2.1.74 shipped in the last 24h (two same-day releases). **Why it matters:** rapid back-to-back releases usually signal active bug-fix/perf iteration and lower risk of staying current.
- **Cursor** — no new release posted in the last 24h (latest listed: “New Plugins on the Cursor Marketplace” on Mar 11 00:00 UTC, just outside this window). **Why it matters:** plugin surface is expanding, but no fresh core update today.
- **Codex / Windsurf** — no new releases in the last 24h (latest listed: Codex v0.114.0 at Mar 11 00:28 UTC; Windsurf update on Mar 9). **Why it matters:** today’s movement is concentrated in Claude Code, not across all major tools.

🤖 AI Daily Brief
- **OpenCode** — v0.48.0 shipped (Mar 12, 17:33 UTC). Why it matters: it’s the only new AI coding-tool release in the last 24h window, so if you use OpenCode, check for fixes/features now.
- **Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Windsurf** — no new releases logged in the last 24h. Why it matters: lower upgrade urgency today; fewer moving parts in your dev-agent stack.
- **Other major tools tracked here (e.g., OpenClaw, Factory, Amp)** — no releases in the last 24h window either. Why it matters: this was a quiet day across the broader AI dev-tools ecosystem.

🤖 AI Daily Brief
- **Claude Code (v2.1.76)**: Added MCP elicitation (interactive structured input mid-task) plus new `Elicitation`/`ElicitationResult` hooks; **why it matters**: enables safer, richer tool workflows and tighter control over MCP server interactions.
- **OpenCode (v0.49.0)**: Shipped a Friday patch with UX fixes, including a command-palette toggle for transparent/background mode; **why it matters**: smoother day-to-day editor experience and fewer UI friction points.
- **Claude Code (v2.1.75)**: Enabled 1M context window for Opus 4.6 by default (Max/Team/Enterprise), plus `/color` and prompt-bar session-name improvements; **why it matters**: bigger tasks fit in-context and multi-session work is easier to manage.
- **Cursor / Codex / Windsurf**: No new releases surfaced on AI Shipped in the last 24 hours.
